docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT EARE, SCOTT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-22-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY GUYTON, VERNA AS TO DEFENDANT EARE, SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EARE, SCOTT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUYTON, VERNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARE, SCOTT $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, THE CONTRACT FOR THE SALE OF THE 1985 TOYOTA CAMRY WITH VIN #T2SVIZE3F6001263 IS HEREBY RESCINDED. CONCURRENT WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, THE PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO RETRIEVE SAID VEHICLE DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EARE, SCOTT
